metaDescription: Meet Júnnior Monzart, creator of BlogAI Pro — blogger, SEO and monetization expert, and platform developer.
ogDescription: The story behind BlogAI Pro: who built it, why it exists, and where it's going.

hero.name: Júnnior Monzart
hero.description: Blogger, SEO and monetization expert, and developer behind BlogAI Pro — the platform that combines artificial intelligence with content production at scale.
hero.portraitAlt: Official photo of Júnnior Monzart, creator of BlogAI Pro

timeline.title: Journey
timeline.subtitle: A timeline up to the official 1.0 launch.

2017.title: First steps on Blogger
2017.description: Beginning of the blogging journey, publishing about tech, productivity and SEO.

2019.title: SEO specialization
2019.description: Deep dive into technical SEO, Search Console, Analytics and organic traffic strategies.

2021.title: Monetization and AdSense
2021.description: Intensive study of blog monetization with Google AdSense, partnerships and evergreen content.

2023.title: Own tools
2023.description: First internal prototypes to automate article generation, meta tags and content clusters.

2025.title: BlogAI Pro is born
2025.description: Official launch of the platform combining generative AI, Blogger publishing and SEO performance in one place.

2026.title: Official ecosystem
2026.description: Public API v1, official WordPress plugin and Android app via Capacitor — ready to scale.

expertise.title: Areas of focus
expertise.subtitle: The technical and editorial foundation behind every BlogAI Pro decision.

blogger.title: Blogger & Content
blogger.text: Years publishing, optimizing and scaling blogs — from zero to monetization.

seo.title: Technical SEO
seo.text: Search Console, Core Web Vitals, schema, indexing and topic clusters.

monetization.title: Monetization
monetization.text: AdSense, partnerships and sustainable revenue strategies for creators.

dev.title: Development
dev.text: React, TypeScript, Supabase and applied AI — BlogAI Pro is 100% original.

story.myStoryText: It all started with a single Blogger blog and the curiosity to understand why some articles ranked on Google and others didn't. Years later, dozens of blogs, thousands of optimized posts and lots of documentation turned that hobby into a profession — and the profession into a product.
story.howText: BlogAI Pro was born from a real pain: publishing consistently, keeping quality high and still tracking SEO data without jumping between 10 tabs. I decided to combine generative AI, native Blogger integration and a performance dashboard connected to Google Search Console — all in a single platform.
story.missionText: Democratize access to professional content and SEO tools so any blogger — beginner or advanced — can publish with agency-level quality.
story.visionText: Make BlogAI Pro the official ecosystem for smart publishing in Portuguese — with public API, WordPress plugin, Android and iOS apps and integrations that respect content creators.
